name: Best Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts. Set aside to cool.
3. Cream softened butter, gradually adding sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add chocolate and vanilla; mix just until blended.
6. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with sour cream, beginning and ending with the flour mixture.
7. Stir in boiling water. (Batter will be thin.)
8. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans, and let cool completely on wire racks.
11. Split cake layers in half horizontally to make 4 layers.
12. Spread Whipped Cream Filling between layers.
13. Spread Chocolate Mocha Frosting on top and sides of cake.
14. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Yield: one 4-layer cake.
